paper_title: Analysis of Atmospheric Aerosol and Glacial Sampling Methods

methods.method_name: Aerosol EC and OC Concentration Measurement
methods.description: This method describes the process of measuring elemental carbon (EC) and organic carbon (OC) concentrations in aerosol samples using a thermal/optical carbon analyzer.

steps.description: A punch of sample (area 0.5 cm²) was put in a quartz boat inside the analyser and heated stepwise at different temperature plateaus.
steps.searchable_summary: Prepare and heat aerosol sample in thermal/optical carbon analyzer

steps.description: The IMPROVE_A temperature protocol defined temperature plateaus for thermally derived carbon fractions.
steps.searchable_summary: Apply IMPROVE_A temperature protocol for carbon fraction analysis

steps.description: EC, OC, and total carbon (TC) were calculated from the eight carbon fractions.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate EC, OC, and TC from carbon fractions

methods.description: This method outlines the collection of carbonaceous data from atmospheric aerosols and precipitation samples across various sites.

steps.description: TSP were collected on pre-combusted quartz fibre filters with a TSP cyclone at a flow rate of 100 L/min for 24 or 48 hours.
steps.searchable_summary: Collect TSP samples using pre-combusted filters and TSP cyclone

steps.description: Precipitation samples were collected by an automated precipitation collector and transferred into HDPE bottles.
steps.searchable_summary: Collect precipitation samples using automated collector

methods.method_name: Glacier, Snow Cover, and Ice Core Sampling
methods.description: This method describes the sampling of surface snow/ice, snowpits, and ice cores from glaciers for analysis.

steps.description: Surface snow samples were collected from the upper 0-10 cm of depth using Whirl-pak bags.
steps.searchable_summary: Collect surface snow samples using Whirl-pak bags

steps.description: Snowpit samples were collected from the accumulation zone of glaciers using a stainless-steel spoon.
steps.searchable_summary: Collect snowpit samples using stainless-steel spoon

steps.description: Ice cores were collected from glaciers using drilling equipment.
steps.searchable_summary: Drill and collect ice cores from glaciers
